_reviewOnly: This manifest is a review/evidence artifact only. It is NOT the production manifest for tile_farm_grass_base (grass_b and grass_c do not exist yet) and its output is NOT a runtime asset. Do not load target.outputPath in Phaser or reference it from a production manifest.
_sourceNote: scripts/normalize-asset-sheet.mjs rejects a plain-RGB source under background.mode 'alpha' (it only accepts alpha-mode sources that already carry an alpha channel, or RGB sources declared with a color-key mode). The approved grass_a source has no alpha channel and this full-bleed terrain has no color key to remove. Rather than mis-declare a color_key mode against a texture with no key color, this manifest points at grass_a.rgba-adapter.png: a byte-exact RGBA copy of the approved source (verified 0/1,572,516 RGB pixel differences, alpha=255 everywhere) produced by round-tripping through this same script's own readPng/writePng. The approved source at assets/source/generated/tile_farm_grass_base/grass_a.png is untouched. See AUDIT.md for detail and the pipeline-limitation note.
